face.structure: heart-shaped with softly tapered chin, high cheekbones

eyes.shape: sharp almond shape with elongated outer corners
eyes.color: deep ultramarine blue with a hint of grey undertone
details: subtle contrast between pupil and iris

face.expression: neutral with a hint of scrutiny, slightly raised left eyebrow

skin.tone: light olive with a natural matte finish
skin.rendering_notes: soft gradient shading emphasizes cheekbones and chin

hair.color: deep jet black with subtle mahogany highlights
hair.flow: windswept to the right, gently cascading down

character.aura: a calm and collected presence, subtle intensity

outfit.fit: tailored fit, allowing for ease of movement

composition.pose: slightly turned towards the left, weight shifted onto right foot
composition.gesture: right hand resting on left elbow, left hand gracefully open to one side

background.color_palette: muted tones of blue and grey with subtle teal accents
background.details: geometric overlay with soft blurring effect
background.rules: maintain minimal contrast to enhance character focus
